# tooltrio.com — Free Online Finance & Health Calculators
# https://tooltrio.com
# Updated: March 2026

## About
400+ free online calculators. No signup. No data stored. All formulas: IRS, CDC, NIH, CFPB, SEC.
Methodology: https://tooltrio.com/methodology
